code:
gantt
    title erlmcp Feature Development Timeline - Through Q2 2026
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD

    section Core Protocol (Education_LMS_Portal)
    OTP 28.3.1 Migration             :core1, 2026-01-01, 2026-01-31
    Native JSON Module              :core2, 2026-01-01, 2w
    Priority Messages (Education_ContentCDN)      :core3, 2026-01-15, 2w
    Process Iteration API           :core4, 2026-01-22, 2w

    section Transports Layer
    WebSocket Transport             :trans1, 2026-02-01, 2w
    SSE Transport                   :trans2, 2026-02-15, 2w
    GraphQL Transport               :trans3, 2026-03-01, 3w
    HTTP/3 Transport (Education_ContentCDN)         :trans4, 2026-04-15, 4w

    section Observability
    OpenTelemetry Integration        :obs1, 2026-01-15, 3w
    Chaos Engineering Framework      :obs2, 2026-02-15, 4w
    Metrics Dashboard                :obs3, 2026-03-01, 3w
    Distributed Tracing              :obs4, 2026-03-15, 3w

    section Scalability (Education_LMS_Portal)
    Foundation Phase                :scal1, 2026-02-03, 2w
    Capacity Increase                :scal2, 2026-02-17, 4w
    Full Scaling                     :scal3, 2026-03-17, 6w

    section Quality & Validation
    TCPS Quality Gates              :qual1, 2026-01-01, 2026-01-31
    Protocol Validator              :qual2, 2026-02-01, 3w
    Security Validator              :qual3, 2026-02-15, 3w
    Performance Validator           :qual4, 2026-03-01, 4w
    Compliance Reporting            :qual5, 2026-03-15, 3w

    section Operations
    CI/CD Workflows                 :ops1, 2026-01-01, 2w
    Deployment Automation           :ops2, 2026-02-01, 3w
    Monitoring Stack                :ops3, 2026-02-15, 4w
    Incident Response Runbooks      :ops4, 2026-03-15, 3w

    section Documentation
    API Reference                   :doc1, 2026-01-01, 4w
    Architecture Docs               :doc2, 2026-01-15, 4w
    User Guides                     :doc3, 2026-02-01, 4w
    Tutorial Examples               :doc4, 2026-02-15, 6w
repo_description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) SDK for Erlang

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为ErlMCP项目制定一份到2026年Q2的完整开发路线图。核心目标是把Education LMS Portal和Education ContentCDN这两个教育场景的客户需求都覆盖到。我想从Core Protocol开始，OTP 28.3.1的迁移必须在一月份完成，这是后续所有功能的基础。
明白，OTP迁移定在一月整月。那Native JSON Module和Priority Messages这两个任务怎么安排？我注意到Priority Messages标注了Education_ContentCDN，是不是意味着这个任务主要是为CDN场景服务的？
对，Native JSON Module和OTP迁移同步启动，都是一月一号开始，但JSON模块只需要两周。Priority Messages确实是ContentCDN的痛点，他们处理大量媒体流需要优先级队列，所以定在一月十五号启动，持续两周。另外Process Iteration API在一月二十二开始，给核心协议收尾。
好的，Core Protocol部分已经理顺。接下来是Transports Layer，我打算把WebSocket和SSE放在二月，GraphQL进三月，HTTP/3放到四月下半月——这个也标注了Education_ContentCDN，是不是因为他们对传输性能要求更高？
没错，ContentCDN需要HTTP/3来优化大规模内容分发。另外Observability这块要尽早介入，OpenTelemetry从一月中就开始，和Priority Messages并行。Chaos Engineering Framework放在二月十五，等基础架构稳定后再引入故障演练。
Scalability部分我标了Education_LMS_Portal，分三个阶段：Foundation二月三号、Capacity二月十七号、Full Scaling三月十七号。这个六周的Full Scaling会不会和Quality & Validation的Performance Validator冲突？后者是三月一号开始，持续四周。

不冲突，正好衔接。Performance Validator验证的是协议层性能，Full Scaling做的是LMS Portal的架构扩展，两者可以并行。Quality & Validation里还有TCPS Quality Gates贯穿一月整月，Protocol Validator二月启动，Security Validator和Chaos Engineering同步，Compliance Reporting三月十五收尾。
最后确认Operations和Documentation：CI/CD和API Reference都从一月初开始，Deployment Automation和Monitoring Stack分别在二月启动，Incident Response Runbooks三月十五跟进。文档部分Tutorial Examples最长，六周持续到三月底。整体时间线覆盖到2026年Q2，结构清晰了。
